title: oreanthes fragilis
intro: Oreanthes fragilis, also known as the 'Delicate Oreanthes', is a species of flowering plant in the family Styracaceae. This plant is a shrub native to the mountainous regions of China, and its bark and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Oreanthes fragilis include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. In terms of health benefits, the herbal preparations of Oreanthes fragilis are used to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, and can be consumed as teas, infusions, or extracts.
intro_study: According to the study on "Osmanthus fragrans" (which is the scientific name for Oreenthes fragilis), Oreenthes fragilis benefits include antioxidant, anticancer, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial activities, which can be used to treat various human diseases.
